scripts.lighthouse:dev: npx start-server-and-test 'npx serve site -p 3001' http://localhost:3001 'npx lighthouse http://localhost:3001 --output=html --output=json --output-path=lighthouse-reports/dev --view'
scripts.lighthouse:branch: slug=$(git rev-parse --abbrev-ref HEAD | sed 's/[^a-zA-Z0-9_-]/-/g' | tr '[:upper:]' '[:lower:]') && url="https://pauseai.uk/preview/$slug/" && status=$(curl -s -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" "$url") && if [ "$status" = "200" ]; then npx lighthouse "$url" --output=html --output=json --output-path=lighthouse-reports/branch --view; else echo "No preview found at $url (HTTP $status)"; fi
